faqs.question: What pests are most common in Bayonne, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bayonne properties commonly deal with German cockroaches, pavement ants, house spiders, mice, and occasional waterbugs due to the city's waterfront location and urban density. Our general pest control service targets all these pests with customized treatment plans.
